subcodes.first_line: The missives of that honored one were perused. All the expressions therein emanated from love and sincerity, and the details were present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوراق آنجناب ملاحظه شد جمیع اذکار منبعث از محبت و خلوص بود و تفاصیل موجود و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
